title: Dance to the Music
album: Rolling Stone Magazine's 500 Greatest Songs Of All Time (2004) - Vol 3 - 201-300
why_this_song: Dance to the Music by Sly and the Family Stone (1967) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 11 times; first heard in: "Say, get up- and dance to the music!"
Appears 11 times; first heard in: "Say, get up- and dance to the music!"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Cynthia (yeah), Jerry! (Go on)"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "All we need is a drummer"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "You might like to hear my organ"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "dance" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "dance" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "music" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "music" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Say, get up- and dance to the music!
I'm gonna add a little guitar

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Dance to the Music" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Dance to the Music", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Dance to the Music" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Dance to the Music" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Dance to the Music", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Dance to the Music", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
